query:
CREATE TABLE `artisans` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`categoryId` int,
	`businessName` varchar(200),
	`profession` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`bio` text,
	`phone` varchar(32),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`website` varchar(500),
	`address` text,
	`city` varchar(100),
	`state` varchar(100),
	`country` varchar(100) DEFAULT 'Nigeria',
	`latitude` float,
	`longitude` float,
	`avatarUrl` text,
	`coverUrl` text,
	`portfolioImages` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`services` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
	`priceMin` decimal(10,2),
	`priceMax` decimal(10,2),
	`currency` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'NGN',
	`isAvailable` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`isVerified` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','suspended') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`yearsExperience` int,
	`languages` json DEFAULT ('["English"]'),
	`avgRating` float DEFAULT 0,
	`totalReviews` int DEFAULT 0,
	`totalBookings` int DEFAULT 0,
	`stripeAccountId` varchar(100),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `artisans_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `bookings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`artisanId` int NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int NOT NULL,
	`serviceDescription` text NOT NULL,
	`scheduledAt` timestamp,
	`address` text,
	`status` enum('pending','confirmed','in_progress','completed','cancelled','disputed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`totalAmount` decimal(10,2),
	`depositAmount` decimal(10,2),
	`currency` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'NGN',
	`paymentStatus` enum('unpaid','deposit_paid','fully_paid','refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unpaid',
	`stripePaymentIntentId` varchar(200),
	`stripeSessionId` varchar(200),
	`notes` text,
	`disputeReason` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `bookings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `categories` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`icon` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`color` varchar(20),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `categories_name_unique` UNIQUE(`name`),
	CONSTRAINT `categories_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
CREATE TABLE `conversations` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int NOT NULL,
	`artisanId` int NOT NULL,
	`lastMessageAt` timestamp DEFAULT (now()),
	`lastMessagePreview` varchar(200),
	`customerUnread` int DEFAULT 0,
	`artisanUnread` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `conversations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `favorites` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`artisanId` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `favorites_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `messages` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`conversationId` int NOT NULL,
	`senderId` int NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`messageType` enum('text','image','booking_request') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'text',
	`isRead` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `messages_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
	`body` text,
	`type` enum('message','booking','review','system','payment') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'system',
	`referenceId` int,
	`referenceType` varchar(50),
	`isRead` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `reviews` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`artisanId` int NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int NOT NULL,
	`bookingId` int,
	`rating` int NOT NULL,
	`comment` text,
	`ownerReply` text,
	`isFlagged` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`flagReason` text,
	`status` enum('published','hidden','flagged') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `reviews_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `avatarUrl` text;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD `phone` varchar(32);
